title: Record soft34 handoff34 and tool2k densify
prompt: Create reports/soft34-handoff34-tool2k.md with sections for Soft 34, Handoff 34, Tool 2k, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft34 Handoff34 Tool2k Contract

## Soft 34
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.34 with quality bias floor 0.32 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 34
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.34 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Tool 2k
tool result budgets default to 2000 chars with 35-char previews; Grep default head_limit is 150 so searches stay inside the denser budget

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status vitest
